headline: Dollar Tree Named Entitlement Sponsor for New England's Only NASCAR Cup Series Race
summary: Speedway Motorsports and Dollar Tree officials announced today the value retailer has been named entitlement sponsor of the NASCAR Cup Series (NCS) race at New Hampshire Motor Speedway (NHMS) and Official Value Retailer of Speedway Motorsports.
